headlines.headline: Xovep Stores reports strong demand in Europe, raises outlook

sentiment.reasoning: Raising outlook based on strong demand provides a clear positive signal for both immediate and medium-term financial performance.

headlines.headline: Talvyn Goods secures $320M contract with an international consortium

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
